# append(row:)

**Instance Method**

Adds a row of values to the data frame.

## Declaration

```swift
mutating func append(row: DataFrame.Row)
```

## Parameters

- **row**: A row from a data frame.

## Adding a Row from a Data Frame

- **insert(row:at:)**: Adds a row of values at a position in the data frame.

items.description: Adds a row of values at a position in the data frame.
items.name: insert(row:at:)
